title: RIAO
wikitext:
[]: RIAO? [Spoilers yo]             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 19, 2009 7:42 am I saw the ending of 2.0 again and in the preview I noticed this: That is the uniform we see Rei wear from the Alternate Universe clip in episode 26. Does anyone think we might see another variation of that Alternate Universe along in 3.0/4.0? lol imagine if a manga called "Rebuild of Angelic Days" get's released.

[]: Re: RIAO? [Spoilers yo]             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Sep 19, 2009 8:32 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Does anyone think we might see another variation ofthat Alternate Universe along in 3.0/4.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Sep 19, 2009 11:54 am It's probably just a Rei clone in a school uniform. If Riao shows up, it'll be hard to take these movies seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 19, 2009 1:26 pm She has the normal Rei face, which means she isn't going to be all "LOL KAWAII DESU WATASHI WA REI-CHAN ", so I'm not worried.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 1:59 pm I think it's what Luc said. They're probably putting Rei in that school uniform as a nod to the GoS2 AU from episode 26, but I think this is just a regular ol' take of Rei. My money is on this being a weird "Rei clones in the tank" sequence where they talk with Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:06 pm I uh.... Ahem.... Don't know what RIAO stands for....

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:10 pm Rei In Appearance Only

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 19, 2009 3:10 pm http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/geektionary.html#riao

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Sep 20, 2009 12:25 pm It's mostly just a nod the Alternate Universe from Episode 26 but I don't expect THAT version of Rei to feature in the films. The teaser trailers at least as far as 2.0 is concerned are very misleading and seem to be done with temp animation. Also that Rei sure has a classic Rei expression. If anything wouldn't a creepy sequence in 3.0 be if when Instrumentality starts or is going all the Rei's in the Reiquarium wake up. .....well if done right that is it could be creepy. If done wrong it could just be a massive fan fetish.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Sun Sep 20, 2009 9:11 pm Doubtful, though it might be interesting to see what the outcome would be if RiAO did show up... would probably derail the whole plot, though, I don't think it'd be worth it. No, it's probably just a weird throwback. hehe. Toast.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 20, 2009 9:28 pm Adekis wrote: hehe. Toast.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:42 am OR they could all have been given new uniforms. New outfits = profit.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:00 am Maybe they decided to give Rei a new set of clothing. Just like Shinji who got new t-shirts

[]:             Quote Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:20 am Maybe its just another uniform because in rebuild they have the budget to buy new clothes, that pic looks like Rei standing up to somebody with other reis cowering behind her

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 1:28 pm Isn't that the school's old uniform?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 21, 2009 1:49 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Isn't that the school's old uniform?

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Sep 21, 2009 2:26 pm I'm pointing to it being another Rei clone, or seeing how 2.0 ended w/ Shinji and Rei trapped in the Entry Plug, Rei very well could have gotten a change in personality some how. But thats just my guess.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Mon Sep 21, 2009 5:26 pm hmm. maybe this time Rei's the one having alternate universe flashes. the uniform (and our associating it to the ep 26 AU) could represent that this is just... Rei as she wishes she could be. in that case it's no longer baka-shinji at the helm of the AU, and Rei probably wouldn't imagine herself as creepy!moe-AD-rei. and she'd probably want the little reis to be around so they get their chance to be individuals and not "replacements" or "spare parts" for her. so maybe it's something like that? *fanwanks* although, if that's the case, why would mari be around? i'm leaning towards the idea that mari and Rei aren't actually in the same scene and it's just anno trolling...

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Sep 22, 2009 12:40 pm although, if that's the case, why would mari be around? i'm leaning towards the idea that mari and Rei aren't actually in the same scene and it's just anno trolling...

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Tue Sep 22, 2009 1:23 pm I'm thinking maybe they don't keep the clones in the Reiquarium this time. Each of them perhaps even has her own soul, too... Maybe the RiAO-iAO!Rei goes to a different school, and when she's at... wherever it is that she stays at (NERV?) she spends her time with her "little sisters"... A nod to both the AU from 26 and Puchi Evaverse...

Does anyone think we might see another variation of that Alternate Universe along in 3.0/4.0? lol imagine if a manga called "Rebuild of Angelic Days" get's released.
